Sage Bot Item Code: A20


Other locations the gear can be found

Magic Well Explorer Chest
Eye of Scorn Artifact

Triggers: Once in a while

The unit starts restoring 5% health to themself and all allies every 0,5 seconds for 6 sec.
The incoming healing healing of the unit and all allies is increased by 25% for the duration of the battle. Also, the unit and all allies restore 2% of their max health every 2 second.

Requirements: 90-100

User rating: 🌝🌝🌝🌝🌝
